steps.t: The Corsairs have landed on a beach south-west of Dol Amroth. Jajax has asked you to search for Abedec at the beach-side landing spot, while he search…
Good vantage points for searching for signs of Abedec can be found atop the watch-towers in Hashadîr, south-west of Dol Amroth. You should climb the w…
Jajax's meeting place is where the roads meet between the two Corsair encampments -- one leads from the south-west, from Hashadîr, and the other leads…
Jajax is likely somewhere in the ruins to the south of Dol Amroth. You should search for Jajax, for he is probably in need of rescue.
